message:
Add initial project structure for TUI application using Bun and TypeScript

- Created .gitignore to exclude build artifacts and dependencies.
- Added package.json with project metadata and dependencies.
- Introduced tsconfig.json for TypeScript configuration.
- Implemented initial source files including index.tsx, declarations.d.ts, and a README for project documentation.
- Included bun.lock for dependency management.
- Established a structured TUI application replicating the features of the "Your Source to Prompt" utility with a focus on terminal UI/UX.

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+# Node / Bun dependencies
+node_modules/
+
+# Builds & artifacts
+dist/
+/s2p
+
+# TypeScript
+*.tsbuildinfo
+
+# Env & local config
+.env
+.env.*
+
+# Logs & debug
+npm-debug.log*
+yarn-debug.log*
+yarn-error.log*
+pnpm-debug.log*
+bun-debug.log*
+*.log
+
+# Editor / OS noise
+.DS_Store
+.idea/
+.vscode/
+

@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+{
+  "name": "source2prompt-tui",
+  "version": "0.3.0",
+  "description": "Hybrid world-class TUI version of Your Source to Prompt (Bun + TypeScript + Ink).",
+  "type": "module",
+  "bin": {
+    "s2p": "dist/index.js"
+  },
+  "scripts": {
+    "dev": "bun run src/index.tsx",
+    "build": "tsc",
+    "build:bin": "bun build ./src/index.tsx --compile --minify --sourcemap --outfile s2p"
+  },
+  "dependencies": {
+    "csso": "^5.0.5",
+    "html-minifier-terser": "^7.2.0",
+    "ignore": "^5.3.0",
+    "ink": "^5.0.1",
+    "ink-big-text": "^2.0.0",
+    "ink-gradient": "^3.0.0",
+    "ink-spinner": "^5.0.0",
+    "ink-syntax-highlight": "^2.0.0",
+    "ink-text-input": "^6.0.0",
+    "js-tiktoken": "^1.0.14",
+    "clipboardy": "^4.0.0",
+    "react": "^18.3.0",
+    "terser": "^5.31.0"
+  },
+  "devDependencies": {
+    "@types/node": "^22.9.0",
+    "@types/react": "^18.3.8",
+    "react-devtools-core": "^7.0.1",
+    "typescript": "^5.6.3"
+  }
+}
